headline: ULTA & 3 Retail-Miscellaneous Stocks Investors Should Watch Now
summary: ULTA, FIVE, SBH & ARHS show resilience in the Retail-Miscellaneous sector as companies adapt to shifting consumer demand with omnichannel platforms, lifestyle-focused products and personalization.

headline: 3 Beauty Stocks to Watch as Innovation and Premiumization Fuel Growth
summary: Beauty demand remains resilient as innovation and premiumization drive growth, with EL, ULTA and IFF well-placed to benefit from evolving industry trends.
